personalities.name: BBS Native
personalities.description: You knew the sysop by name. ASCII art was your high-res graphics. The handshake sound is your lullaby.

personalities.name: Web Pioneer
personalities.description: You viewed source on everything. Gray backgrounds. Blue links. You had a 'Best viewed in Netscape' badge.

personalities.name: Dial-Up Survivor
personalities.description: 'Get off the phone!' is your battle cry. You mastered the 56k handshake. Busy signals built character.

personalities.name: Dot-Com Dreamer
personalities.description: You had a GeoCities site. Guestbook signatures were currency. You believed pets.com would change the world.

personalities.name: Broadband Pioneer
personalities.description: Always on. No handshake. Napster. AIM away messages as personality tests.

personalities.name: Web 2.0 Creator
personalities.description: Round corners. Gradients. Tags. You blogged. You tagged. You friended. You were the content.

personalities.name: Mobile Native
personalities.description: Pinch to zoom. 'There's an app for that.' Touch replaced click. You designed for thumbs.

personalities.name: Social Graph Native
personalities.description: The feed. The like. The share. Your friends became your editors. The algorithm learned you.

personalities.name: Stream Child
personalities.description: No buffering. Binge culture. Twitch plays Pokémon. Bandwidth became invisible.

personalities.name: Algorithmic Native
personalities.description: For you. Recommended. You don't follow — you're followed. Chronological is a myth.

personalities.name: Pandemic Digital
personalities.description: Zoom school. Remote everything. The internet became the only place. Digital fatigue is real.

personalities.name: AI Native
personalities.description: The web writes itself. Chat. Generate. Summarize. The line between human and synthetic blurs.
